title: JBL Jukebox And Fetty Wap Discs
description: JBL Jukebox And Fetty Wap Discs
body:
Listen to Fetty Wap on the JBL Jukebox just like our lord intended...

EVERYONE SHOULD NOTE: if you search "disc" in the creative menu, they will **not** show up. you should instead search "Fetty Track"

**!! I DO NOT OWN THE RIGHTS TO THESE SONGS - ALL MUSICAL CREDITS GO TO FETTY WAP AND RESPECTIVE COLLABORATORS, PRODUCERS, RECORD LABELS, AND BRANDS !! THIS IS PURELY FOR FUN !!**
